decisions.briefing: Market is neutral today with NASDAQ off -0.8% and S&P 500 flat — not a risk-on setup. Despite holding $577 in cash with 4 open slots, the strategy playbook is clear: do not force buys near the $500 floor on neutral days; wait for a genuine risk-on signal before deploying. The top-scoring candidates (CAR, NKTR, AUGO) remain attractive and will be first in line when NASDAQ shows a proper bounce. All six existing positions are held — none are near stop-loss or profit targets.

market_education.summary_en: Markets drifted sideways on July 2 as investors lightened positioning ahead of the long Independence Day holiday weekend, with thin pre-holiday volume exaggerating small intraday moves. The NASDAQ slipped -0.8% on mild selling in rate-sensitive tech and growth names, while the broader S&P 500 held nearly flat, indicating sector rotation rather than a broad risk-off event. Pre-holiday sessions historically see compressed conviction and reduced institutional participation, making momentum signals less reliable for new entries.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股在7月2日呈現橫盤漂移格局，投資者趁國慶長假前夕主動降低倉位，清淡的成交量令盤中細微波動被放大。納斯達克指數下跌0.8%，對利率敏感的科技及成長股承受輕度拋壓，而標普500指數則幾近持平，反映板塊輪動而非全面避險情緒。歷史上，假期前交易日機構參與度偏低，動量信號的可靠性下降，並非追入新倉的理想時機。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Pre-holiday drift is the tendency for stock markets to lose direction and volume in the sessions just before a major holiday. With fewer institutional traders at their desks, price moves are smaller and less meaningful, momentum signals become noisy, and the risk of entering a position that reverses when full volume returns the following week is elevated.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「假期前漂移」是指股市在重大節假日前夕的交易日往往缺乏方向感且成交量萎縮的現象。由於機構投資者大量缺席，價格波動幅度偏小且參考意義有限，動量指標的噪音增加，若此時貿然建倉，假期後大量資金回流時出現反轉的風險也相對較高。
